```{r}
    remifentanil_expanded <- remifentanil_expanded[!is.na(med_dose)]
    
    # normalize odd weight-based hourly entries to mcg/kg/min
    remifentanil_expanded[
      med_dose_unit == "mcg/kg/hr" & !is.na(med_dose),
      `:=`(
        med_dose = med_dose / 60,
        med_dose_unit = "mcg/kg/min"
      )
    ]
    
    # If merge/filter leaves no usable rows, return empty shells
    if (nrow(remifentanil_expanded) == 0) {
      
      cont_remi_receipt <<- empty_med_table(c(
        "hospitalization_id",
        "cont_remi_receipt"
      ))
      
      empty_med_table(c(
        "hospitalization_id",
        "remifentanil_total_48",
        "remifentanil_total_mme_48",
        "remifentanil_avg_mcgkgmin_48"
      ))
      
    } else {
      
      DTremi <- copy(remifentanil_expanded)
      
      DTremi[, begin_imv := as.POSIXct(begin_imv)]
      DTremi[, end_imv := as.POSIXct(end_imv)]
      DTremi[, admin_dttm := as.POSIXct(admin_dttm)]
      
      # normalize med_dose_unit for robustness
      DTremi[, med_dose_unit := trimws(tolower(med_dose_unit))]
      
      DTremi[, `:=`(
        start_grace = begin_imv - 60 * 60,
        end_48h = begin_imv + 48 * 60 * 60
      )]
      
      DTremi[, window_end := fifelse(
        !is.na(end_imv) & end_imv < end_48h,
        end_imv,
        end_48h
      )]
      
      # ---------------------------
      # Split infusion vs bolus
      # ---------------------------
      inf <- DTremi[med_dose_unit == "mcg/kg/min"]
      setorder(inf, hospitalization_id, admin_dttm)
      
      bolus <- DTremi[med_dose_unit == "mcg"]
      
      # ---------------------------
      # BOLUS: mcg doses within window
      # ---------------------------
      bolus_48 <- bolus[
        admin_dttm >= begin_imv &
          admin_dttm <= window_end &
          !is.na(med_dose),
        .(bolus_mcg_48h = sum(med_dose, na.rm = TRUE)),
        by = hospitalization_id
      ]
      
      # ---------------------------
      # INFUSION timeline
      # ---------------------------
      baseline_rows <- inf[
        admin_dttm >= start_grace & admin_dttm < begin_imv,
        .SD[.N],
        by = hospitalization_id
      ][
        , admin_dttm := begin_imv
      ]
      
      inf_0_win <- inf[
        admin_dttm >= begin_imv & admin_dttm <= window_end
      ]
      
      inf2 <- rbindlist(
        list(inf_0_win, baseline_rows),
        use.names = TRUE,
        fill = TRUE
      )
      
      # if multiple rows at same timestamp, keep the last one
      setorder(inf2, hospitalization_id, admin_dttm)
      inf2 <- inf2[, .SD[.N], by = .(hospitalization_id, admin_dttm)]
      
      # intervals
      inf2[, next_admin_dttm := shift(admin_dttm, type = "lead"), by = hospitalization_id]
      inf2[, interval_end := fifelse(
        is.na(next_admin_dttm),
        window_end,
        pmin(next_admin_dttm, window_end)
      )]
      inf2[, duration_min := as.numeric(difftime(interval_end, admin_dttm, units = "mins"))]
      
      # convert to mcg/min, then integrate to mcg
      inf2[, remi_rate_mcg_min := med_dose * weight_kg]
      inf2[, infusion_mcg := remi_rate_mcg_min * duration_min]
      
      inf_48 <- inf2[
        duration_min > 0 & !is.na(remi_rate_mcg_min),
        .(
          infusion_mcg_48h = sum(infusion_mcg, na.rm = TRUE),
          infusion_minutes_48h = sum(duration_min, na.rm = TRUE)
        ),
        by = hospitalization_id
      ]
      
      # only count infusion if >= 60 minutes
      inf_48[is.na(infusion_minutes_48h), infusion_minutes_48h := 0]
      inf_48[infusion_minutes_48h < 60, infusion_mcg_48h := 0]
      
      # Receipt of continuous remifentanil
      cont_remi_receipt <<- unique(
        inf_48[infusion_mcg_48h > 0, .(hospitalization_id)]
      )
      cont_remi_receipt[, cont_remi_receipt := 1L]
      
      # If no qualifying receipt rows, keep empty shell
      if (nrow(cont_remi_receipt) == 0) {
        cont_remi_receipt <<- empty_med_table(c(
          "hospitalization_id",
          "cont_remi_receipt"
        ))
      }
      
      # ---------------------------
      # Combine infusion + bolus
      # ---------------------------
      remifentanil_total_48h <- merge(
        inf_48,
        bolus_48,
        by = "hospitalization_id",
        all = TRUE
      )
      
      remifentanil_total_48h[is.na(infusion_mcg_48h), infusion_mcg_48h := 0]
      remifentanil_total_48h[is.na(bolus_mcg_48h), bolus_mcg_48h := 0]
      remifentanil_total_48h[is.na(infusion_minutes_48h), infusion_minutes_48h := 0]
      
      remifentanil_total_48h[, remifentanil_total_48 := infusion_mcg_48h + bolus_mcg_48h]
      remifentanil_total_48h <- remifentanil_total_48h[, .(
        hospitalization_id,
        remifentanil_total_48
      )]
      
      remifentanil_total_48h[, remifentanil_total_mme_48 := remifentanil_total_48 * 0.1]
      
      # Merge in duration and weight
      remifentanil_total_48h <- merge(
        remifentanil_total_48h,
        final_cohort_imv_runs[, .(
          hospitalization_id,
          imv_duration_hours_final,
          weight_kg
        )],
        by = "hospitalization_id",
        all.x = TRUE
      )
      
      # Cap at 48h
      remifentanil_total_48h[, imv_hours_capped := fcase(
        is.na(imv_duration_hours_final), NA_real_,
        imv_duration_hours_final > 48, 48,
        default = imv_duration_hours_final
      )]
      
      # Weight-based average rate including boluses:
      # total mcg / (kg * minutes) = mcg/kg/min
      remifentanil_total_48h[, remifentanil_avg_mcgkgmin_48 :=
        remifentanil_total_48 / (weight_kg * imv_hours_capped * 60)
      ]
      
      remifentanil_total_48h[
        weight_kg <= 0 | imv_hours_capped <= 0,
        remifentanil_avg_mcgkgmin_48 := NA_real_
      ]
      
      remifentanil_total_48h[, .(
        hospitalization_id,
        remifentanil_total_48,
        remifentanil_total_mme_48,
        remifentanil_avg_mcgkgmin_48
      )]
    }
  }
  
},
empty_cols = c(
  "hospitalization_id",
  "remifentanil_total_48",
  "remifentanil_total_mme_48",
  "remifentanil_avg_mcgkgmin_48"
),
med_name = "remifentanil")
################################################################################
# Midazolam
################################################################################
midazolam_total_48h <- safe_med_eval({
  
  midazolam_cont <- meds[
    hospitalization_id %in% final_cohort_imv_runs$hospitalization_id &
      med_category == "midazolam"
  ]
  
  midazolam_int <- intermittent_meds[
    hospitalization_id %in% final_cohort_imv_runs$hospitalization_id &
      med_category == "midazolam"
  ]
  
  # If no midazolam exists in either source, return empty shells
  if (nrow(midazolam_cont) == 0 && nrow(midazolam_int) == 0) {
    
    cont_midaz_receipt <<- empty_med_table(c(
      "hospitalization_id",
      "cont_midaz_receipt"
    ))
    
    empty_med_table(c(
      "hospitalization_id",
      "midaz_total_48",
      "midazolam_avg_mghr_48"
    ))
    
  } else {
    
    midazolam_combined <- merge(
      midazolam_cont,
      midazolam_int,
      by = c(
        "hospitalization_id",
        "admin_dttm",
        "med_dose",
        "med_dose_unit",
        "med_category",
        "med_group",
        "med_route_category"
      ),
      all = TRUE
    )
    
    setorder(midazolam_combined, hospitalization_id, admin_dttm)
    
    midazolam_expanded <- merge(
      midazolam_combined,
      final_cohort_imv_runs,
      by = "hospitalization_id",
      all = TRUE
    )
    
    midazolam_expanded <- midazolam_expanded[!is.na(med_dose)]
    
    # If merge/filter leaves no usable rows, return empty shells
    if (nrow(midazolam_expanded) == 0) {
      
      cont_midaz_receipt <<- empty_med_table(c(
        "hospitalization_id",
        "cont_midaz_receipt"
      ))
      
      empty_med_table(c(
        "hospitalization_id",
        "midaz_total_48",
        "midazolam_avg_mghr_48"
      ))
      
    } else {
      
      DTmidaz <- copy(midazolam_expanded)
      
      DTmidaz[, begin_imv := as.POSIXct(begin_imv)]
      DTmidaz[, end_imv := as.POSIXct(end_imv)]
      DTmidaz[, admin_dttm := as.POSIXct(admin_dttm)]
      
      # normalize med_dose_unit for robustness
      DTmidaz[, med_dose_unit := trimws(tolower(med_dose_unit))]
      
      DTmidaz[, `:=`(
        start_grace = begin_imv - 60 * 60,
        end_48h = begin_imv + 48 * 60 * 60
      )]
      
      # If end_imv is earlier than begin_imv + 48h, cap there
      DTmidaz[, window_end := fifelse(
        !is.na(end_imv) & end_imv < end_48h,
        end_imv,
        end_48h
      )]
      
      # ---------------------------
      # Split infusion vs bolus
      # ---------------------------
      inf <- DTmidaz[med_dose_unit == "mg/hr"]
      setorder(inf, hospitalization_id, admin_dttm)
      
      bolus <- DTmidaz[med_dose_unit == "mg"]
      
      # ---------------------------
      # BOLUS: mg doses within 48h
      # ---------------------------
      bolus_48 <- bolus[
        admin_dttm >= begin_imv &
          admin_dttm <= window_end &
          !is.na(med_dose),
        .(bolus_mg_48h = sum(med_dose, na.rm = TRUE)),
        by = hospitalization_id
      ]
      
      # ---------------------------
      # INFUSION timeline
      # ---------------------------
      baseline_rows <- inf[
        admin_dttm >= start_grace & admin_dttm < begin_imv,
        .SD[.N],
        by = hospitalization_id
      ][
        , admin_dttm := begin_imv
      ]
      
      inf_0_48 <- inf[
        admin_dttm >= begin_imv & admin_dttm <= window_end
      ]
      
      inf2 <- rbindlist(
        list(inf_0_48, baseline_rows),
        use.names = TRUE,
        fill = TRUE
      )
      
      # if multiple rows at same timestamp, keep the last one
      setorder(inf2, hospitalization_id, admin_dttm)
      inf2 <- inf2[, .SD[.N], by = .(hospitalization_id, admin_dttm)]
      
      # durations
      inf2[, next_admin_dttm := shift(admin_dttm, type = "lead"), by = hospitalization_id]
      inf2[, interval_end := fifelse(
        is.na(next_admin_dttm),
        window_end,
        pmin(next_admin_dttm, window_end)
      )]
      inf2[, duration_min := as.numeric(difftime(interval_end, admin_dttm, units = "mins"))]
      
      # integrate: mg/hr -> mg/min -> mg
      inf2[, midaz_rate_mg_min := med_dose / 60]
      inf2[, infusion_mg := midaz_rate_mg_min * duration_min]
      
      inf_48 <- inf2[
        duration_min > 0 & !is.na(midaz_rate_mg_min),
        .(
          infusion_mg_48h = sum(infusion_mg, na.rm = TRUE),
          infusion_minutes_48h = sum(duration_min, na.rm = TRUE)
        ),
        by = hospitalization_id
      ]
      
      # zero out infusion dose if < 60 minutes total infusion time
      inf_48[is.na(infusion_minutes_48h), infusion_minutes_48h := 0]
      inf_48[infusion_minutes_48h < 60, infusion_mg_48h := 0]
      
      # Receipt of continuous midazolam
      cont_midaz_receipt <<- unique(
        inf_48[infusion_mg_48h > 0, .(hospitalization_id)]
      )
      cont_midaz_receipt[, cont_midaz_receipt := 1L]
      
      # If no qualifying receipt rows, keep empty shell
      if (nrow(cont_midaz_receipt) == 0) {
        cont_midaz_receipt <<- empty_med_table(c(
          "hospitalization_id",
          "cont_midaz_receipt"
        ))
      }
      
      # ---------------------------
      # Combine infusion + bolus
      # ---------------------------
      midazolam_total_48h <- merge(
        inf_48,
        bolus_48,
        by = "hospitalization_id",
        all = TRUE
      )
      
      midazolam_total_48h[is.na(infusion_mg_48h), infusion_mg_48h := 0]
      midazolam_total_48h[is.na(bolus_mg_48h), bolus_mg_48h := 0]
      
      midazolam_total_48h[, midaz_total_48 := infusion_mg_48h + bolus_mg_48h]
      midazolam_total_48h <- midazolam_total_48h[, .(
        hospitalization_id,
        midaz_total_48
      )]
      
      # Merge in duration
      midazolam_total_48h <- merge(
        midazolam_total_48h,
        final_cohort_imv_runs[, .(
          hospitalization_id,
          imv_duration_hours_final
        )],
        by = "hospitalization_id",
        all.x = TRUE
      )
      
      # Cap at 48h
      midazolam_total_48h[, imv_hours_capped := fcase(
        is.na(imv_duration_hours_final), NA_real_,
        imv_duration_hours_final > 48, 48,
        default = imv_duration_hours_final
      )]
      
      # Average mg/hr
      midazolam_total_48h[, midazolam_avg_mghr_48 := midaz_total_48 / imv_hours_capped]
      midazolam_total_48h[imv_hours_capped <= 0, midazolam_avg_mghr_48 := NA_real_]
      
      midazolam_total_48h[, .(
        hospitalization_id,
        midaz_total_48,
        midazolam_avg_mghr_48
      )]
    }
  }
  
},
empty_cols = c(
  "hospitalization_id",
  "midaz_total_48",
  "midazolam_avg_mghr_48"
),
med_name = "midazolam")
################################################################################
# Lorazepam
################################################################################
lorazepam_total_48h <- safe_med_eval({
  
  lorazepam_cont <- meds[
    hospitalization_id %in% final_cohort_imv_runs$hospitalization_id &
      med_category == "lorazepam"
  ]
  
  lorazepam_int <- intermittent_meds[
    hospitalization_id %in% final_cohort_imv_runs$hospitalization_id &
      med_category == "lorazepam"
  ]
  
  # If no lorazepam exists in either source, return empty shells
  if (nrow(lorazepam_cont) == 0 && nrow(lorazepam_int) == 0) {
    
    cont_loraz_receipt <<- empty_med_table(c(
      "hospitalization_id",
      "cont_loraz_receipt"
    ))
    
    empty_med_table(c(
      "hospitalization_id",
      "loraz_total_48",
      "lorazepam_avg_mghr_48"
    ))
    
  } else {
    
    lorazepam_combined <- merge(
      lorazepam_cont,
      lorazepam_int,
      by = c(
        "hospitalization_id",
        "admin_dttm",
        "med_dose",
        "med_dose_unit",
        "med_category",
        "med_group",
        "med_route_category"
      ),
      all = TRUE
    )
    
    setorder(lorazepam_combined, hospitalization_id, admin_dttm)
    
    lorazepam_expanded <- merge(
      lorazepam_combined,
      final_cohort_imv_runs,
      by = "hospitalization_id",
      all = TRUE
    )
    
    lorazepam_expanded <- lorazepam_expanded[!is.na(med_dose)]
    
    # If merge/filter leaves no usable rows, return empty shells
    if (nrow(lorazepam_expanded) == 0) {
      
      cont_loraz_receipt <<- empty_med_table(c(
        "hospitalization_id",
        "cont_loraz_receipt"
      ))
      
      empty_med_table(c(
        "hospitalization_id",
        "loraz_total_48",
        "lorazepam_avg_mghr_48"
      ))
      
    } else {
      
      DTloraz <- copy(lorazepam_expanded)
      
      DTloraz[, begin_imv := as.POSIXct(begin_imv)]
      DTloraz[, end_imv := as.POSIXct(end_imv)]
      DTloraz[, admin_dttm := as.POSIXct(admin_dttm)]
      
      # normalize med_dose_unit for robustness
      DTloraz[, med_dose_unit := trimws(tolower(med_dose_unit))]
      
      DTloraz[, `:=`(
        start_grace = begin_imv - 60 * 60,
        end_48h = begin_imv + 48 * 60 * 60
      )]
      
      # If end_imv is earlier than begin_imv + 48h, cap there
      DTloraz[, window_end := fifelse(
        !is.na(end_imv) & end_imv < end_48h,
        end_imv,
        end_48h
      )]
      
      # ---------------------------
      # Split infusion vs bolus
      # ---------------------------
      inf <- DTloraz[med_dose_unit == "mg/hr"]
      setorder(inf, hospitalization_id, admin_dttm)
      
      bolus <- DTloraz[med_dose_unit == "mg"]
      
      # ---------------------------
      # BOLUS: mg doses within 48h
      # ---------------------------
      bolus_48 <- bolus[
        admin_dttm >= begin_imv &
          admin_dttm <= window_end &
          !is.na(med_dose),
        .(bolus_mg_48h = sum(med_dose, na.rm = TRUE)),
        by = hospitalization_id
      ]
      
      # ---------------------------
      # INFUSION timeline
      # ---------------------------
      baseline_rows <- inf[
        admin_dttm >= start_grace & admin_dttm < begin_imv,
        .SD[.N],
        by = hospitalization_id
      ][
        , admin_dttm := begin_imv
      ]
      
      inf_0_48 <- inf[
        admin_dttm >= begin_imv & admin_dttm <= window_end
      ]
      
      inf2 <- rbindlist(
        list(inf_0_48, baseline_rows),
        use.names = TRUE,
        fill = TRUE
      )
      
      # if multiple rows at same timestamp, keep the last one
      setorder(inf2, hospitalization_id, admin_dttm)
      inf2 <- inf2[, .SD[.N], by = .(hospitalization_id, admin_dttm)]
      
      # durations
      inf2[, next_admin_dttm := shift(admin_dttm, type = "lead"), by = hospitalization_id]
      inf2[, interval_end := fifelse(
        is.na(next_admin_dttm),
        window_end,
        pmin(next_admin_dttm, window_end)
      )]
      inf2[, duration_min := as.numeric(difftime(interval_end, admin_dttm, units = "mins"))]
      
      # integrate: mg/hr -> mg/min -> mg
      inf2[, loraz_rate_mg_min := med_dose / 60]
      inf2[, infusion_mg := loraz_rate_mg_min * duration_min]
      
      inf_48 <- inf2[
        duration_min > 0 & !is.na(loraz_rate_mg_min),
        .(
          infusion_mg_48h = sum(infusion_mg, na.rm = TRUE),
          infusion_minutes_48h = sum(duration_min, na.rm = TRUE)
        ),
        by = hospitalization_id
      ]
      
      # zero out infusion dose if < 60 minutes total infusion time
      inf_48[is.na(infusion_minutes_48h), infusion_minutes_48h := 0]
      inf_48[infusion_minutes_48h < 60, infusion_mg_48h := 0]
      
      # Receipt of continuous lorazepam
      cont_loraz_receipt <<- unique(
        inf_48[infusion_mg_48h > 0, .(hospitalization_id)]
      )
      cont_loraz_receipt[, cont_loraz_receipt := 1L]
      
      # If no qualifying receipt rows, keep empty shell
      if (nrow(cont_loraz_receipt) == 0) {
        cont_loraz_receipt <<- empty_med_table(c(
          "hospitalization_id",
          "cont_loraz_receipt"
        ))
      }
      
      # ---------------------------
      # Combine infusion + bolus
      # ---------------------------
      lorazepam_total_48h <- merge(
        inf_48,
        bolus_48,
        by = "hospitalization_id",
        all = TRUE
      )
      
      lorazepam_total_48h[is.na(infusion_mg_48h), infusion_mg_48h := 0]
      lorazepam_total_48h[is.na(bolus_mg_48h), bolus_mg_48h := 0]
      
      lorazepam_total_48h[, loraz_total_48 := infusion_mg_48h + bolus_mg_48h]
      lorazepam_total_48h <- lorazepam_total_48h[, .(
        hospitalization_id,
        loraz_total_48
      )]
      
      # Merge in duration
      lorazepam_total_48h <- merge(
        lorazepam_total_48h,
        final_cohort_imv_runs[, .(
          hospitalization_id,
          imv_duration_hours_final
        )],
        by = "hospitalization_id",
        all.x = TRUE
      )
      
      # Cap at 48h
      lorazepam_total_48h[, imv_hours_capped := fcase(
        is.na(imv_duration_hours_final), NA_real_,
        imv_duration_hours_final > 48, 48,
        default = imv_duration_hours_final
      )]
      
      # Average mg/hr
      lorazepam_total_48h[, lorazepam_avg_mghr_48 := loraz_total_48 / imv_hours_capped]
      lorazepam_total_48h[imv_hours_capped <= 0, lorazepam_avg_mghr_48 := NA_real_]
      
      lorazepam_total_48h[, .(
        hospitalization_id,
        loraz_total_48,
        lorazepam_avg_mghr_48
      )]
    }
  }
  
},
empty_cols = c(
  "hospitalization_id",
  "loraz_total_48",
  "lorazepam_avg_mghr_48"
),
med_name = "lorazepam")
################################################################################
# Diazepam
################################################################################
diazepam_total_48h <- safe_med_eval({
  
  diazepam_cont <- meds[
    hospitalization_id %in% final_cohort_imv_runs$hospitalization_id &
      med_category == "diazepam"
  ]
  
  diazepam_int <- intermittent_meds[
    hospitalization_id %in% final_cohort_imv_runs$hospitalization_id &
      med_category == "diazepam"
  ]
  
  # If no diazepam exists in either source, return empty shells
  if (nrow(diazepam_cont) == 0 && nrow(diazepam_int) == 0) {
    
    cont_diaz_receipt <<- empty_med_table(c(
      "hospitalization_id",
      "cont_diaz_receipt"
    ))
    
    empty_med_table(c(
      "hospitalization_id",
      "diaz_total_48",
      "diazepam_avg_mghr_48"
    ))
    
  } else {
    
    diazepam_combined <- merge(
      diazepam_cont,
      diazepam_int,
      by = c(
        "hospitalization_id",
        "admin_dttm",
        "med_dose",
        "med_dose_unit",
        "med_category",
        "med_group",
        "med_route_category"
      ),
      all = TRUE
    )
    
    setorder(diazepam_combined, hospitalization_id, admin_dttm)
    
    diazepam_expanded <- merge(
      diazepam_combined,
      final_cohort_imv_runs,
      by = "hospitalization_id",
      all = TRUE
    )
    
    diazepam_expanded <- diazepam_expanded[!is.na(med_dose)]
    
    # If merge/filter leaves no usable rows, return empty shells
    if (nrow(diazepam_expanded) == 0) {
      
      cont_diaz_receipt <<- empty_med_table(c(
        "hospitalization_id",
        "cont_diaz_receipt"
      ))
      
      empty_med_table(c(
        "hospitalization_id",
        "diaz_total_48",
        "diazepam_avg_mghr_48"
      ))
      
    } else {
      
      DTdiaz <- copy(diazepam_expanded)
      
      DTdiaz[, begin_imv := as.POSIXct(begin_imv)]
      DTdiaz[, end_imv := as.POSIXct(end_imv)]
      DTdiaz[, admin_dttm := as.POSIXct(admin_dttm)]
      
      # normalize med_dose_unit for robustness
      DTdiaz[, med_dose_unit := trimws(tolower(med_dose_unit))]
      
      DTdiaz[, `:=`(
        start_grace = begin_imv - 60 * 60,
        end_48h = begin_imv + 48 * 60 * 60
      )]
      
      # If end_imv is earlier than begin_imv + 48h, cap there
      DTdiaz[, window_end := fifelse(
        !is.na(end_imv) & end_imv < end_48h,
        end_imv,
        end_48h
      )]
      
      # ---------------------------
      # Split infusion vs bolus
      # ---------------------------
      inf <- DTdiaz[med_dose_unit == "mg/hr"]
      setorder(inf, hospitalization_id, admin_dttm)
      
      bolus <- DTdiaz[med_dose_unit == "mg"]
      
      # ---------------------------
      # BOLUS: mg doses within 48h
      # ---------------------------
      bolus_48 <- bolus[
        admin_dttm >= begin_imv &
          admin_dttm <= window_end &
          !is.na(med_dose),
        .(bolus_mg_48h = sum(med_dose, na.rm = TRUE)),
        by = hospitalization_id
      ]
      
      # ---------------------------
      # INFUSION timeline
      # ---------------------------
      baseline_rows <- inf[
        admin_dttm >= start_grace & admin_dttm < begin_imv,
        .SD[.N],
        by = hospitalization_id
      ][
        , admin_dttm := begin_imv
      ]
      
      inf_0_48 <- inf[
        admin_dttm >= begin_imv & admin_dttm <= window_end
      ]
      
      inf2 <- rbindlist(
        list(inf_0_48, baseline_rows),
        use.names = TRUE,
        fill = TRUE
      )
      
      # if multiple rows at same timestamp, keep the last one
      setorder(inf2, hospitalization_id, admin_dttm)
      inf2 <- inf2[, .SD[.N], by = .(hospitalization_id, admin_dttm)]
      
      # durations
      inf2[, next_admin_dttm := shift(admin_dttm, type = "lead"), by = hospitalization_id]
      inf2[, interval_end := fifelse(
        is.na(next_admin_dttm),
        window_end,
        pmin(next_admin_dttm, window_end)
      )]
      inf2[, duration_min := as.numeric(difftime(interval_end, admin_dttm, units = "mins"))]
      
      # integrate: mg/hr -> mg/min -> mg
      inf2[, diaz_rate_mg_min := med_dose / 60]
      inf2[, infusion_mg := diaz_rate_mg_min * duration_min]
      
      inf_48 <- inf2[
        duration_min > 0 & !is.na(diaz_rate_mg_min),
        .(
          infusion_mg_48h = sum(infusion_mg, na.rm = TRUE),
          infusion_minutes_48h = sum(duration_min, na.rm = TRUE)
        ),
        by = hospitalization_id
      ]
      
      # zero out infusion dose if < 60 minutes total infusion time
      inf_48[is.na(infusion_minutes_48h), infusion_minutes_48h := 0]
      inf_48[infusion_minutes_48h < 60, infusion_mg_48h := 0]
      
      # Receipt of continuous diazepam
      cont_diaz_receipt <<- unique(
        inf_48[infusion_mg_48h > 0, .(hospitalization_id)]
      )
      cont_diaz_receipt[, cont_diaz_receipt := 1L]
      
      # If no qualifying receipt rows, keep empty shell
      if (nrow(cont_diaz_receipt) == 0) {
        cont_diaz_receipt <<- empty_med_table(c(
          "hospitalization_id",
          "cont_diaz_receipt"
        ))
      }
      
      # ---------------------------
      # Combine infusion + bolus
      # ---------------------------
      diazepam_total_48h <- merge(
        inf_48,
        bolus_48,
        by = "hospitalization_id",
        all = TRUE
      )
      
      diazepam_total_48h[is.na(infusion_mg_48h), infusion_mg_48h := 0]
      diazepam_total_48h[is.na(bolus_mg_48h), bolus_mg_48h := 0]
      
      diazepam_total_48h[, diaz_total_48 := infusion_mg_48h + bolus_mg_48h]
      diazepam_total_48h <- diazepam_total_48h[, .(
        hospitalization_id,
        diaz_total_48
      )]
      
      # Merge in duration
      diazepam_total_48h <- merge(
        diazepam_total_48h,
        final_cohort_imv_runs[, .(
          hospitalization_id,
          imv_duration_hours_final
        )],
        by = "hospitalization_id",
        all.x = TRUE
      )
      
      # Cap at 48h
      diazepam_total_48h[, imv_hours_capped := fcase(
        is.na(imv_duration_hours_final), NA_real_,
        imv_duration_hours_final > 48, 48,
        default = imv_duration_hours_final
      )]
      
      # Average mg/hr
      diazepam_total_48h[, diazepam_avg_mghr_48 := diaz_total_48 / imv_hours_capped]
      diazepam_total_48h[imv_hours_capped <= 0, diazepam_avg_mghr_48 := NA_real_]
      
      diazepam_total_48h[, .(
        hospitalization_id,
        diaz_total_48,
        diazepam_avg_mghr_48
      )]
    }
  }
  
},
empty_cols = c(
  "hospitalization_id",
  "diaz_total_48",
  "diazepam_avg_mghr_48"
),
med_name = "diazepam")
################################################################################
# Ketamine
###############################################################################
ketamine_total_48h <- safe_med_eval({
  
  ketamine_cont <- meds[
    hospitalization_id %in% final_cohort_imv_runs$hospitalization_id &
      med_category == "ketamine"
  ]
  
  ketamine_int <- intermittent_meds[
    hospitalization_id %in% final_cohort_imv_runs$hospitalization_id &
      med_category == "ketamine"
  ]
  
  # If no ketamine exists in either source, return empty shells
  if (nrow(ketamine_cont) == 0 && nrow(ketamine_int) == 0) {
    
    cont_ketamine_receipt <<- empty_med_table(c(
      "hospitalization_id",
      "cont_ketamine_receipt"
    ))
    
    empty_med_table(c(
      "hospitalization_id",
      "ketamine_total_48",
      "ketamine_avg_mgkghr_48"
    ))
    
  } else {
    
    ketamine_combined <- merge(
      ketamine_cont,
      ketamine_int,
      by = c(
        "hospitalization_id",
        "admin_dttm",
        "med_dose",
        "med_dose_unit",
        "med_category",
        "med_group",
        "med_route_category"
      ),
      all = TRUE
    )
    
    setorder(ketamine_combined, hospitalization_id, admin_dttm)
    
    ketamine_expanded <- merge(
      ketamine_combined,
      final_cohort_imv_runs,
      by = "hospitalization_id",
      all = TRUE
    )
    
    ketamine_expanded <- ketamine_expanded[!is.na(med_dose)]
    
    # normalize units
    ketamine_expanded[, med_dose_unit := trimws(tolower(med_dose_unit))]
    
    # convert mcg/kg/hr to mg/kg/hr if it appears
    ketamine_expanded[
      med_dose_unit == "mcg/kg/hr",
      `:=`(
        med_dose = med_dose / 1000,
        med_dose_unit = "mg/kg/hr"
      )
    ]
    
    # If merge/filter leaves no usable rows, return empty shells
    if (nrow(ketamine_expanded) == 0) {
      
      cont_ketamine_receipt <<- empty_med_table(c(
        "hospitalization_id",
        "cont_ketamine_receipt"
      ))
      
      empty_med_table(c(
        "hospitalization_id",
        "ketamine_total_48",
        "ketamine_avg_mgkghr_48"
      ))
      
    } else {
      
      DTketa <- copy(ketamine_expanded)
      
      DTketa[, begin_imv := as.POSIXct(begin_imv)]
      DTketa[, end_imv := as.POSIXct(end_imv)]
      DTketa[, admin_dttm := as.POSIXct(admin_dttm)]
      
      # normalize med_dose_unit for robustness
      DTketa[, med_dose_unit := trimws(tolower(med_dose_unit))]
      
      DTketa[, `:=`(
        start_grace = begin_imv - 60 * 60,
        end_48h = begin_imv + 48 * 60 * 60
      )]
      
      DTketa[, window_end := fifelse(
        !is.na(end_imv) & end_imv < end_48h,
        end_imv,
        end_48h
      )]
      
      # ---------------------------
      # Split infusion vs bolus
      # ---------------------------
      inf <- DTketa[med_dose_unit == "mg/kg/hr"]
      setorder(inf, hospitalization_id, admin_dttm)
      
      bolus <- DTketa[med_dose_unit == "mg"]
      
      # ---------------------------
      # BOLUS: mg within window
      # ---------------------------
      bolus_48 <- bolus[
        admin_dttm >= begin_imv &
          admin_dttm <= window_end &
          !is.na(med_dose),
        .(bolus_mg_48h = sum(med_dose, na.rm = TRUE)),
        by = hospitalization_id
      ]
      
      # ---------------------------
      # INFUSION timeline
      # ---------------------------
      baseline_rows <- inf[
        admin_dttm >= start_grace & admin_dttm < begin_imv,
        .SD[.N],
        by = hospitalization_id
      ][
        , admin_dttm := begin_imv
      ]
      
      inf_0_win <- inf[
        admin_dttm >= begin_imv & admin_dttm <= window_end
      ]
      
      inf2 <- rbindlist(
        list(inf_0_win, baseline_rows),
        use.names = TRUE,
        fill = TRUE
      )
      
      # if multiple rows at the same timestamp, keep the last one
      setorder(inf2, hospitalization_id, admin_dttm)
      inf2 <- inf2[, .SD[.N], by = .(hospitalization_id, admin_dttm)]
      
      # intervals
      inf2[, next_admin_dttm := shift(admin_dttm, type = "lead"), by = hospitalization_id]
      inf2[, interval_end := fifelse(
        is.na(next_admin_dttm),
        window_end,
        pmin(next_admin_dttm, window_end)
      )]
      inf2[, duration_min := as.numeric(difftime(interval_end, admin_dttm, units = "mins"))]
      
      # integrate:
      # mg/kg/hr * kg = mg/hr
      # mg/hr / 60 = mg/min
      inf2[, ketamine_rate_mg_min := (med_dose * weight_kg) / 60]
      inf2[, infusion_mg := ketamine_rate_mg_min * duration_min]
      
      inf_48 <- inf2[
        duration_min > 0 & !is.na(ketamine_rate_mg_min),
        .(
          infusion_mg_48h = sum(infusion_mg, na.rm = TRUE),
          infusion_minutes_48h = sum(duration_min, na.rm = TRUE)
        ),
        by = hospitalization_id
      ]
      
      # require >=60 minutes infusion
      inf_48[is.na(infusion_minutes_48h), infusion_minutes_48h := 0]
      inf_48[infusion_minutes_48h < 60, infusion_mg_48h := 0]
      
      # Receipt of continuous ketamine
      cont_ketamine_receipt <<- unique(
        inf_48[infusion_mg_48h > 0, .(hospitalization_id)]
      )
      cont_ketamine_receipt[, cont_ketamine_receipt := 1L]
      
      # If no qualifying receipt rows, keep empty shell
      if (nrow(cont_ketamine_receipt) == 0) {
        cont_ketamine_receipt <<- empty_med_table(c(
          "hospitalization_id",
          "cont_ketamine_receipt"
        ))
      }
      
      # ---------------------------
      # Combine infusion + bolus
      # ---------------------------
      ketamine_total_48h <- merge(
        inf_48,
        bolus_48,
        by = "hospitalization_id",
        all = TRUE
      )
      
      ketamine_total_48h[is.na(infusion_mg_48h), infusion_mg_48h := 0]
      ketamine_total_48h[is.na(bolus_mg_48h), bolus_mg_48h := 0]
      ketamine_total_48h[is.na(infusion_minutes_48h), infusion_minutes_48h := 0]
      
      ketamine_total_48h[, ketamine_total_48 := infusion_mg_48h + bolus_mg_48h]
      ketamine_total_48h <- ketamine_total_48h[, .(
        hospitalization_id,
        ketamine_total_48
      )]
      
      # Merge in duration and weight
      ketamine_total_48h <- merge(
        ketamine_total_48h,
        final_cohort_imv_runs[, .(
          hospitalization_id,
          imv_duration_hours_final,
          weight_kg
        )],
        by = "hospitalization_id",
        all.x = TRUE
      )
      
      # Cap at 48h
      ketamine_total_48h[, imv_hours_capped := fcase(
        is.na(imv_duration_hours_final), NA_real_,
        imv_duration_hours_final > 48, 48,
        default = imv_duration_hours_final
      )]
      
      # Average mg/kg/hr
      ketamine_total_48h[, ketamine_avg_mgkghr_48 :=
        ketamine_total_48 / (weight_kg * imv_hours_capped)
      ]
      ketamine_total_48h[
        weight_kg <= 0 | imv_hours_capped <= 0,
        ketamine_avg_mgkghr_48 := NA_real_
      ]
      
      ketamine_total_48h[, .(
        hospitalization_id,
        ketamine_total_48,
        ketamine_avg_mgkghr_48
      )]
    }
  }
  
},
empty_cols = c(
  "hospitalization_id",
  "ketamine_total_48",
  "ketamine_avg_mgkghr_48"
),
med_name = "ketamine")
###############################################################################
# Pentobarbital
###############################################################################
pentobarbital_total_48h <- safe_med_eval({
  
  pentobarbital_cont <- meds[
    hospitalization_id %in% final_cohort_imv_runs$hospitalization_id &
      med_category == "pentobarbital"
  ]
  
  pentobarbital_int <- intermittent_meds[
    hospitalization_id %in% final_cohort_imv_runs$hospitalization_id &
      med_category == "pentobarbital"
  ]
  
  # If no pentobarbital exists in either source, return empty shells
  if (nrow(pentobarbital_cont) == 0 && nrow(pentobarbital_int) == 0) {
    
    cont_pentobarbital_receipt <<- empty_med_table(c(
      "hospitalization_id",
      "cont_pentobarbital_receipt"
    ))
    
    empty_med_table(c(
      "hospitalization_id",
      "pentobarbital_total_48",
      "pentobarbital_avg_mghr_48"
    ))
    
  } else {
    
    pentobarbital_combined <- merge(
      pentobarbital_cont,
      pentobarbital_int,
      by = c(
        "hospitalization_id",
        "admin_dttm",
        "med_dose",
        "med_dose_unit",
        "med_category",
        "med_group",
        "med_route_category"
      ),
      all = TRUE
    )
    
    setorder(pentobarbital_combined, hospitalization_id, admin_dttm)
    
    pentobarbital_expanded <- merge(
      pentobarbital_combined,
      final_cohort_imv_runs,
      by = "hospitalization_id",
      all = TRUE
    )
    
    pentobarbital_expanded <- pentobarbital_expanded[!is.na(med_dose)]
    
    # normalize units for matching/conversion
    pentobarbital_expanded[, med_dose_unit := trimws(tolower(med_dose_unit))]
    
    # Convert weight-based infusion units to mg/hr where possible
    pentobarbital_expanded[
      med_dose_unit == "mg/kg/hr" & !is.na(weight_kg) & weight_kg > 0,
      `:=`(
        med_dose = med_dose * weight_kg,
        med_dose_unit = "mg/hr"
      )
    ]
    
    pentobarbital_expanded[
      med_dose_unit == "mcg/kg/hr" & !is.na(weight_kg) & weight_kg > 0,
      `:=`(
        med_dose = (med_dose * weight_kg) / 1000,
        med_dose_unit = "mg/hr"
      )
    ]
    
    pentobarbital_expanded[
      med_dose_unit == "mcg/hr",
      `:=`(
        med_dose = med_dose / 1000,
        med_dose_unit = "mg/hr"
      )
    ]
    
    pentobarbital_expanded[
      med_dose_unit == "mcg",
      `:=`(
        med_dose = med_dose / 1000,
        med_dose_unit = "mg"
      )
    ]
    
    # Drop rows that still cannot be interpreted safely
    pentobarbital_expanded <- pentobarbital_expanded[
      !(med_dose_unit %in% c("mg/kg/hr", "mcg/kg/hr") & (is.na(weight_kg) | weight_kg <= 0))
    ]
    
    # If merge/filter leaves no usable rows, return empty shells
    if (nrow(pentobarbital_expanded) == 0) {
      
      cont_pentobarbital_receipt <<- empty_med_table(c(
        "hospitalization_id",
        "cont_pentobarbital_receipt"
      ))
      
      empty_med_table(c(
        "hospitalization_id",
        "pentobarbital_total_48",
        "pentobarbital_avg_mghr_48"
      ))
      
    } else {
      
      DTpento <- copy(pentobarbital_expanded)
      
      DTpento[, begin_imv := as.POSIXct(begin_imv)]
      DTpento[, end_imv := as.POSIXct(end_imv)]
      DTpento[, admin_dttm := as.POSIXct(admin_dttm)]
      
      # normalize again just in case
      DTpento[, med_dose_unit := trimws(tolower(med_dose_unit))]
      
      DTpento[, `:=`(
        start_grace = begin_imv - 60 * 60,
        end_48h = begin_imv + 48 * 60 * 60
      )]
      
      DTpento[, window_end := fifelse(
        !is.na(end_imv) & end_imv < end_48h,
        end_imv,
        end_48h
      )]
      
      # ---------------------------
      # Split infusion vs bolus
      # ---------------------------
      inf <- DTpento[med_dose_unit == "mg/hr"]
      setorder(inf, hospitalization_id, admin_dttm)
      
      bolus <- DTpento[med_dose_unit == "mg"]
      
      # ---------------------------
      # BOLUS: mg within window
      # ---------------------------
      bolus_48 <- bolus[
        admin_dttm >= begin_imv &
          admin_dttm <= window_end &
          !is.na(med_dose),
        .(bolus_mg_48h = sum(med_dose, na.rm = TRUE)),
        by = hospitalization_id
      ]
      
      # ---------------------------
      # INFUSION timeline
      # ---------------------------
      baseline_rows <- inf[
        admin_dttm >= start_grace & admin_dttm < begin_imv,
        .SD[.N],
        by = hospitalization_id
      ][
        , admin_dttm := begin_imv
      ]
      
      inf_0_win <- inf[
        admin_dttm >= begin_imv & admin_dttm <= window_end
      ]
      
      inf2 <- rbindlist(
        list(inf_0_win, baseline_rows),
        use.names = TRUE,
        fill = TRUE
      )
      
      # if multiple rows at same timestamp, keep the last one
      setorder(inf2, hospitalization_id, admin_dttm)
      inf2 <- inf2[, .SD[.N], by = .(hospitalization_id, admin_dttm)]
      
      # intervals
      inf2[, next_admin_dttm := shift(admin_dttm, type = "lead"), by = hospitalization_id]
      inf2[, interval_end := fifelse(
        is.na(next_admin_dttm),
        window_end,
        pmin(next_admin_dttm, window_end)
      )]
      inf2[, duration_min := as.numeric(difftime(interval_end, admin_dttm, units = "mins"))]
      
      # integrate: mg/hr -> mg/min -> mg
      inf2[, pentobarbital_rate_mg_min := med_dose / 60]
      inf2[, infusion_mg := pentobarbital_rate_mg_min * duration_min]
      
      inf_48 <- inf2[
        duration_min > 0 & !is.na(pentobarbital_rate_mg_min),
        .(
          infusion_mg_48h = sum(infusion_mg, na.rm = TRUE),
          infusion_minutes_48h = sum(duration_min, na.rm = TRUE)
        ),
        by = hospitalization_id
      ]
      
      # require >=60 minutes infusion
      inf_48[is.na(infusion_minutes_48h), infusion_minutes_48h := 0]
      inf_48[infusion_minutes_48h < 60, infusion_mg_48h := 0]
      
      # Receipt of continuous pentobarbital
      cont_pentobarbital_receipt <<- unique(
        inf_48[infusion_mg_48h > 0, .(hospitalization_id)]
      )
      cont_pentobarbital_receipt[, cont_pentobarbital_receipt := 1L]
      
      # If no qualifying receipt rows, keep empty shell
      if (nrow(cont_pentobarbital_receipt) == 0) {
        cont_pentobarbital_receipt <<- empty_med_table(c(
          "hospitalization_id",
          "cont_pentobarbital_receipt"
        ))
      }
      
      # ---------------------------
      # Combine infusion + bolus
      # ---------------------------
      pentobarbital_total_48h <- merge(
        inf_48,
        bolus_48,
        by = "hospitalization_id",
        all = TRUE
      )
      
      pentobarbital_total_48h[is.na(infusion_mg_48h), infusion_mg_48h := 0]
      pentobarbital_total_48h[is.na(bolus_mg_48h), bolus_mg_48h := 0]
      pentobarbital_total_48h[is.na(infusion_minutes_48h), infusion_minutes_48h := 0]
      
      pentobarbital_total_48h[, pentobarbital_total_48 := infusion_mg_48h + bolus_mg_48h]
      pentobarbital_total_48h <- pentobarbital_total_48h[, .(
        hospitalization_id,
        pentobarbital_total_48
      )]
      
      # Merge in duration
      pentobarbital_total_48h <- merge(
        pentobarbital_total_48h,
        final_cohort_imv_runs[, .(
          hospitalization_id,
          imv_duration_hours_final
        )],
        by = "hospitalization_id",
        all.x = TRUE
      )
      
      # Cap at 48h
      pentobarbital_total_48h[, imv_hours_capped := fcase(
        is.na(imv_duration_hours_final), NA_real_,
        imv_duration_hours_final > 48, 48,
        default = imv_duration_hours_final
      )]
      
      # Average mg/hr
      pentobarbital_total_48h[, pentobarbital_avg_mghr_48 := pentobarbital_total_48 / imv_hours_capped]
      pentobarbital_total_48h[imv_hours_capped <= 0, pentobarbital_avg_mghr_48 := NA_real_]
      
      pentobarbital_total_48h[, .(
        hospitalization_id,
        pentobarbital_total_48,
        pentobarbital_avg_mghr_48
      )]
    }
  }
  
},
empty_cols = c(
  "hospitalization_id",
  "pentobarbital_total_48",
  "pentobarbital_avg_mghr_48"
),
med_name = "pentobarbital")

# Failsafe in case of unexpected scoping issue
if (!exists("cont_pentobarbital_receipt")) {
  cont_pentobarbital_receipt <- empty_med_table(c(
    "hospitalization_id",
    "cont_pentobarbital_receipt"
  ))
}

################################################################################
# Continuous Paralytics
###############################################################################
paralytics_final <- safe_med_eval({
  
  paralytics <- meds[
    hospitalization_id %in% final_cohort_imv_runs$hospitalization_id &
      med_group %in% c("paralytics", "paralytic")
  ]
  
  # If no continuous paralytics exist, return empty shell
  if (nrow(paralytics) == 0) {
    
    empty_med_table(c(
      "hospitalization_id",
      "continuous_nmba_48",
      "continuous_nmba_start_48",
      "continuous_nmba_hours_48",
      "paralytics_total_cont_48"
    ))
    
  } else {
    
    setorder(paralytics, hospitalization_id, admin_dttm)
    
    paralytics_expanded <- merge(
      paralytics,
      final_cohort_imv_runs,
      by = "hospitalization_id",
      all = TRUE
    )
    
    paralytics_expanded <- paralytics_expanded[!is.na(med_dose)]
    
    # If merge/filter leaves no usable rows, return empty shell
    if (nrow(paralytics_expanded) == 0) {
      
      empty_med_table(c(
        "hospitalization_id",
        "continuous_nmba_48",
        "continuous_nmba_start_48",
        "continuous_nmba_hours_48",
        "paralytics_total_cont_48"
      ))
      
    } else {
      
      DTparalytics <- copy(paralytics_expanded)
      
      DTparalytics[, begin_imv := as.POSIXct(begin_imv)]
      DTparalytics[, end_imv := as.POSIXct(end_imv)]
      DTparalytics[, admin_dttm := as.POSIXct(admin_dttm)]
      
      # normalize med_dose_unit for robustness
      DTparalytics[, med_dose_unit := trimws(tolower(med_dose_unit))]
      
      DTparalytics[, `:=`(
        start_grace = begin_imv - 60 * 60,
        end_48h = begin_imv + 48 * 60 * 60
      )]
      
      # If end_imv is earlier than begin_imv + 48h, cap there
      DTparalytics[, window_end := fifelse(
        !is.na(end_imv) & end_imv < end_48h,
        end_imv,
        end_48h
      )]
      
      # ---------------------------
      # Continuous infusion only
      # ---------------------------
      inf <- DTparalytics[med_dose_unit == "mcg/kg/min"]
      setorder(inf, hospitalization_id, admin_dttm)
      
      # If no qualifying infusion rows, return empty shell
      if (nrow(inf) == 0) {
        
        empty_med_table(c(
          "hospitalization_id",
          "continuous_nmba_48",
          "continuous_nmba_start_48",
          "continuous_nmba_hours_48",
          "paralytics_total_cont_48"
        ))
        
      } else {
        
        # ---------------------------
        # INFUSION timeline
        # ---------------------------
        baseline_rows <- inf[
          admin_dttm >= start_grace & admin_dttm < begin_imv,
          .SD[.N],
          by = hospitalization_id
        ][
          , admin_dttm := begin_imv
        ]
        
        inf_0_48 <- inf[
          admin_dttm >= begin_imv & admin_dttm <= window_end
        ]
        
        inf2 <- rbindlist(
          list(inf_0_48, baseline_rows),
          use.names = TRUE,
          fill = TRUE
        )
        
        setorder(inf2, hospitalization_id, admin_dttm)
        inf2 <- inf2[, .SD[.N], by = .(hospitalization_id, admin_dttm)]
        
        inf2[, next_admin_dttm := shift(admin_dttm, type = "lead"), by = hospitalization_id]
        
        inf2[, interval_end := fifelse(
          is.na(next_admin_dttm),
          window_end,
          pmin(next_admin_dttm, window_end)
        )]
        
        inf2[, duration_min := as.numeric(difftime(interval_end, admin_dttm, units = "mins"))]
        
        # convert infusion rate: mcg/kg/min -> mcg/min
        inf2[, paralytics_rate_mcg_min := med_dose * weight_kg]
        inf2[, infusion_mg := (paralytics_rate_mcg_min * duration_min) / 1000]
        
        # Keep only valid infusion intervals
        inf2_valid <- inf2[
          duration_min > 0 & !is.na(paralytics_rate_mcg_min)
        ]
        
        # Summarize start time and infusion duration in first 48h
        paralytics_inf_summary <- inf2_valid[
          ,
          .(
            continuous_nmba_start_48 = min(admin_dttm, na.rm = TRUE),
            continuous_nmba_minutes_48 = sum(duration_min, na.rm = TRUE),
            continuous_nmba_hours_48 = sum(duration_min, na.rm = TRUE) / 60
          ),
          by = hospitalization_id
        ]
        
        # Apply 60-minute rule
        paralytics_inf_summary[continuous_nmba_minutes_48 < 60, `:=`(
          continuous_nmba_start_48 = as.POSIXct(NA),
          continuous_nmba_hours_48 = 0
        )]
        
        # Total dose in first 48h
        inf_48 <- inf2_valid[
          ,
          .(
            infusion_mg_48h = sum(infusion_mg, na.rm = TRUE),
            infusion_minutes_48h = sum(duration_min, na.rm = TRUE)
          ),
          by = hospitalization_id
        ]
        
        # zero out infusion dose if < 60 minutes total infusion time
        inf_48[is.na(infusion_minutes_48h), infusion_minutes_48h := 0]
        inf_48[infusion_minutes_48h < 60, infusion_mg_48h := 0]
        
        # Final continuous paralytic total
        paralytics_cont_48h <- inf_48[, .(
          hospitalization_id,
          paralytics_total_cont_48 = infusion_mg_48h
        )]
        
        # Merge in timing summary
        paralytics_cont_48h <- merge(
          paralytics_cont_48h,
          paralytics_inf_summary[, .(
            hospitalization_id,
            continuous_nmba_start_48,
            continuous_nmba_hours_48
          )],
          by = "hospitalization_id",
          all = TRUE
        )
        
        # Merge onto cohort ids so missing patients are retained
        paralytics_final <- merge(
          final_cohort_imv_runs[, .(hospitalization_id)],
          paralytics_cont_48h,
          by = "hospitalization_id",
          all.x = TRUE
        )
        
        # Fill in missing values
        paralytics_final[is.na(paralytics_total_cont_48), paralytics_total_cont_48 := 0]
        paralytics_final[is.na(continuous_nmba_hours_48), continuous_nmba_hours_48 := 0]
        
        # Binary indicator
        paralytics_final[, continuous_nmba_48 := as.integer(paralytics_total_cont_48 > 0)]
        
        paralytics_final[, .(
          hospitalization_id,
          continuous_nmba_48,
          continuous_nmba_start_48,
          continuous_nmba_hours_48,
          paralytics_total_cont_48
        )]
      }
    }
  }
  
},
empty_cols = c(
  "hospitalization_id",
  "continuous_nmba_48",
  "continuous_nmba_start_48",
  "continuous_nmba_hours_48",
  "paralytics_total_cont_48"
),
med_name = "continuous_paralytics")
################################################################################
# Push Paralytics
###############################################################################
paralytic_pushes_first_48h_final <- safe_med_eval({
  
  paralytic_pushes <- intermittent_meds[
    hospitalization_id %in% final_cohort_imv_runs$hospitalization_id &
      med_group %in% c("paralytic", "paralytics")
  ]
  
  # If no paralytic pushes exist, return empty shell
  if (nrow(paralytic_pushes) == 0) {
    
    empty_med_table(c(
      "hospitalization_id",
      "push_paralytics"
    ))
    
  } else {
    
    setorder(paralytic_pushes, hospitalization_id, admin_dttm)
    
    reduced_hosp_info <- final_cohort_imv_runs[, .(
      hospitalization_id,
      begin_imv,
      end_imv
    )]
    
    paralytics_hosp_merge <- merge(
      paralytic_pushes,
      reduced_hosp_info,
      by = "hospitalization_id",
      all = TRUE
    )
    
    paralytics_hosp_merge <- paralytics_hosp_merge[
      !is.na(med_dose) & med_dose > 0
    ]
    
    # If merge/filter leaves no usable rows, return empty shell
    if (nrow(paralytics_hosp_merge) == 0) {
      
      empty_med_table(c(
        "hospitalization_id",
        "push_paralytics"
      ))
      
    } else {
      
      DTpushpar <- copy(paralytics_hosp_merge)
      
      DTpushpar[, begin_imv := as.POSIXct(begin_imv)]
      DTpushpar[, end_imv := as.POSIXct(end_imv)]
      DTpushpar[, admin_dttm := as.POSIXct(admin_dttm)]
      
      DTpushpar[, `:=`(
        start_4h = begin_imv + 4 * 60 * 60,
        end_48h = begin_imv + 48 * 60 * 60
      )]
      
      # Cap at end_imv if shorter than 48h
      DTpushpar[, window_end := fifelse(
        !is.na(end_imv) & end_imv < end_48h,
        end_imv,
        end_48h
      )]
      
      paralytic_pushes_first_48h <- DTpushpar[
        admin_dttm >= start_4h & admin_dttm <= window_end
      ]
      
      # If no pushes in window, return empty shell
      if (nrow(paralytic_pushes_first_48h) == 0) {
        
        empty_med_table(c(
          "hospitalization_id",
          "push_paralytics"
        ))
        
      } else {
        
        paralytic_pushes_first_48h_final <- unique(
          paralytic_pushes_first_48h[, .(hospitalization_id)],
          by = "hospitalization_id"
        )
        
        paralytic_pushes_first_48h_final[, push_paralytics := 1L]
        
        paralytic_pushes_first_48h_final[, .(
          hospitalization_id,
          push_paralytics
        )]
      }
    }
  }
  
},
empty_cols = c(
  "hospitalization_id",
  "push_paralytics"
),
med_name = "push_paralytics")
################################################################################
# Merge all meds tables

tables_merge_meds <- list(
  propofol_total_48h,
  cont_prop_receipt,
  precedex_total_48h,
  cont_precedex_receipt,
  fentanyl_total_48h,
  cont_fent_receipt,
  hydromorphone_total_48h,
  cont_hydro_receipt,
  morphine_total_48h,
  cont_morphine_receipt,
  remifentanil_total_48h,
  cont_remi_receipt,
  midazolam_total_48h,
  cont_midaz_receipt,
  lorazepam_total_48h,
  cont_loraz_receipt,
  diazepam_total_48h,
  cont_diaz_receipt,
  ketamine_total_48h,
  cont_ketamine_receipt,
  pentobarbital_total_48h,
  cont_pentobarbital_receipt,
  paralytics_final,
  paralytic_pushes_first_48h_final
)

summary_meds_data <- safe_merge_meds(
  tables = tables_merge_meds,
  cohort_ids = final_cohort_imv_runs
)

# Fill in binary variables with 0 if missing 

# Identify all "cont_" columns
cont_cols <- grep("^cont_", names(summary_meds_data), value = TRUE)

# Replace NA with 0 for those columns
summary_meds_data[, (cont_cols) := 
  lapply(.SD, function(x) as.integer(!is.na(x) & x > 0)),
  .SDcols = cont_cols
]

# Any continuous opioid receipt
summary_meds_data[, cont_opioids_receipt := as.integer(
  fcoalesce(cont_fent_receipt, 0L) == 1 |
  fcoalesce(cont_hydro_receipt, 0L) == 1 |
  fcoalesce(cont_morphine_receipt, 0L) == 1 |
  fcoalesce(cont_remi_receipt, 0L) == 1
)]

# Any continuous benzo receipt
summary_meds_data[, cont_benzos_receipt := as.integer(
  fcoalesce(cont_midaz_receipt, 0L) == 1 |
  fcoalesce(cont_loraz_receipt, 0L) == 1 |
  fcoalesce(cont_diaz_receipt, 0L) == 1
)]

# Any continuous sedation receipt
summary_meds_data[, cont_sedation_receipt := as.integer(
  fcoalesce(cont_prop_receipt, 0L) == 1 |
  fcoalesce(cont_precedex_receipt, 0L) == 1 |
  fcoalesce(cont_ketamine_receipt, 0L) == 1 |
  fcoalesce(cont_pentobarbital_receipt, 0L) == 1 |
  fcoalesce(cont_benzos_receipt, 0L) == 1
)]

# Lorazepam Equivalents
summary_meds_data[, lorazepam_equiv_total_48 := 
  fcoalesce(loraz_total_48, 0) + 
  fcoalesce(midaz_total_48, 0) / 2 + 
  fcoalesce(diaz_total_48, 0) / 10
]

# Morphine Equivalents
summary_meds_data[, total_mme := 
  fcoalesce(fentanyl_total_mme_48, 0) +
  fcoalesce(hydromorphone_total_mme_48, 0) +
  fcoalesce(morphine_total_mme_48, 0) +
  fcoalesce(remifentanil_total_mme_48, 0)
]

# Analgesia Only
summary_meds_data[, cont_analgesia_only := as.integer(
  cont_opioids_receipt == 1 & cont_sedation_receipt == 0
)]

# Fill in 0s
summary_meds_data[, `:=`(
  propofol_avg_mcgkgmin_48 = fcoalesce(propofol_avg_mcgkgmin_48, 0),
  dexmedetomidine_avg_mcgkghr_48 = fcoalesce(dexmedetomidine_avg_mcgkghr_48, 0),
  push_paralytics = fcoalesce(as.double(push_paralytics), 0)
)]

# Reduce
summary_meds_data_final <- summary_meds_data[, .(hospitalization_id, propofol_avg_mcgkgmin_48,
                                           dexmedetomidine_avg_mcgkghr_48, cont_prop_receipt,
                                           cont_precedex_receipt, cont_opioids_receipt, 
                                           cont_benzos_receipt, cont_ketamine_receipt, cont_pentobarbital_receipt,
                                           total_mme, lorazepam_equiv_total_48, 
                                           continuous_nmba_48, continuous_nmba_start_48,
                                           continuous_nmba_hours_48, push_paralytics, cont_analgesia_only)]
```


# PART SIX: Identify acute respiratory failure patients
```{r}
# Identify Patients with Acute Respiratory Failure in the 24 hours prior to IMV
# Find SpO2 and RR values from the 24 hours prior to IMV
# Vitals for just required hospitalization_ids
resp_vital_categories <- c("spo2", "respiratory_rate")
vitals_resp <- vitals_time_dependent[vital_category %in% resp_vital_categories]
resp_values <- vitals_resp[hospitalization_id %in% final_cohort_imv_runs_reduced$hospitalization_id]

# Merge vital values and final_imv_runs
merged_resp_values <- merge(resp_values, final_cohort_imv_runs_reduced, by = "hospitalization_id", , all.x = TRUE)
setorder(merged_resp_values, hospitalization_id, recorded_dttm)

# Filter for 24-hour pre IMV window values
merged_resp_values_24h <- merged_resp_values %>%
  filter(recorded_dttm >= (begin_imv - lubridate::hours(24)) &
         recorded_dttm <= begin_imv)
setorder(merged_resp_values_24h, hospitalization_id, recorded_dttm)
merged_resp_values_24h_final <- merged_resp_values_24h[, .(hospitalization_id, recorded_dttm, vital_category, vital_value)]
merged_resp_values_24h_final_dedup <- merged_resp_values_24h_final[
  , .(vital_value = first(vital_value)),
  by = .(hospitalization_id, recorded_dttm, vital_category)
]

# Pivot Long to Wide
resp_wide <- merged_resp_values_24h_final_dedup %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    id_cols   = c(hospitalization_id, recorded_dttm),
    names_from  = vital_category,
    values_from = vital_value
  )

# Find respiratory support values from the 24 hours prior to IMV
# Resp_supp just for the required hospitalization_ids
respiratory_support_part_three <- respiratory_support[, .(hospitalization_id, recorded_dttm, device_category, fio2_set, lpm_set)][hospitalization_id %in% final_cohort_imv_runs_reduced$hospitalization_id]

# Merge resp_supp and final_cohort_imv_runs_reduced
resp_supp_three_merge <- merge(respiratory_support_part_three, final_cohort_imv_runs_reduced, by = "hospitalization_id", all.x = TRUE)
setorder(resp_supp_three_merge, hospitalization_id, recorded_dttm)

# Filter for the 24 hours prior to starting IMV
resp_supp_three_merge_24h <- resp_supp_three_merge %>%
  filter(recorded_dttm >= (begin_imv - lubridate::hours(24)) &
         recorded_dttm <= begin_imv)
setorder(resp_supp_three_merge_24h, hospitalization_id, recorded_dttm)
resp_supp_three_merge_24h_final <- resp_supp_three_merge_24h[, .(hospitalization_id, recorded_dttm, device_category, fio2_set, lpm_set)]

# Find Labs from the 24 hours prior to IMV
# Labs for just the required hosp_ids
resp_labs_categories <- c("pco2_venous", "pco2_arterial", "ph_venous", "ph_arterial")
labs_resp <- labs_time_dependent[lab_category %in% resp_labs_categories]
labs_resp_filt <- labs_resp[hospitalization_id %in% final_cohort_imv_runs_reduced$hospitalization_id]

# Merge with Final_cohort_imv_runs
merged_labs_resp <- merge(labs_resp_filt, final_cohort_imv_runs_reduced, by = "hospitalization_id", all = TRUE)
setorder(merged_labs_resp, hospitalization_id, lab_result_dttm)

# Filter for the 24 hours prior to starting IMV
merged_labs_values_24h <- merged_labs_resp %>%
  filter(lab_result_dttm >= (begin_imv - lubridate::hours(24)) &
         lab_result_dttm <= begin_imv)
setorder(merged_labs_values_24h, hospitalization_id, lab_result_dttm)
merged_labs_values_24h_final <- merged_labs_values_24h[, .(hospitalization_id, lab_result_dttm, lab_category, lab_value_numeric)]
merged_labs_values_24h_final <- merged_labs_values_24h_final %>%
  rename(recorded_dttm = lab_result_dttm)
merged_labs_values_24h_final_dedup <- merged_labs_values_24h_final[
  , .(lab_value_numeric = first(lab_value_numeric)),
  by = .(hospitalization_id, recorded_dttm, lab_category)
]

# Pivot Long to Wide
labs_wide <- merged_labs_values_24h_final_dedup %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    id_cols   = c(hospitalization_id, recorded_dttm),
    names_from  = lab_category,
    values_from = lab_value_numeric
  )

# Clean Up and Merge the Three Time Filtered Tables
merged_all <- resp_supp_three_merge_24h_final %>%
  dplyr::full_join(labs_wide,
                   by = c("hospitalization_id", "recorded_dttm")) %>%
  dplyr::full_join(resp_wide, #Respiratory vitals
                   by = c("hospitalization_id", "recorded_dttm"))


# Use LOCF to fill out spo2, device_category, and pco2
merged_all_locf <- merged_all %>%
  arrange(hospitalization_id, recorded_dttm) %>%
  group_by(hospitalization_id) %>%
  fill(spo2, pco2_arterial, pco2_venous, device_category, .direction = "down") %>%  # LOCF
  ungroup()

# Criteria #1: Single O2 Saturation value of less than or equal to 85% while on supplemental O2
#   Create flag for rows where spo2 values are =<85%
merged_all_locf <- merged_all_locf %>%
  mutate(spo2_low_flag = if_else(spo2 <= 85, TRUE, FALSE, missing = FALSE))

# Create flag for rows where device_category is something other than "room air"
merged_all_locf <- merged_all_locf %>%
  mutate(device_support_flag = if_else(!is.na(device_category) & device_category != "room air",
                                       TRUE, FALSE))

# Create flag for rows that have BOTH the spo2_flag and the non_ra flag
merged_all_locf <- merged_all_locf %>%
  mutate(criteria_one_flag = if_else(spo2_low_flag & device_support_flag, TRUE, FALSE))

# Criteria #2: Receipt of supplemental O2 >= 6 LPM or >= 40% FiO2 on two distinct measurements
#   Flag for hospitalization_ids with 2 or more lpm_set values >= 6
merged_all_locf <- merged_all_locf %>%
  group_by(hospitalization_id) %>%
  mutate(criteria_two_flow_flag = sum(lpm_set >= 6, na.rm = TRUE) >= 2) %>%
  ungroup()

# Flag for hospitalization_ids with 2 or more fio2_set values >= 40
merged_all_locf <- merged_all_locf %>%
  group_by(hospitalization_id) %>%
  mutate(criteria_two_fio2_flag = sum(fio2_set >= 0.40, na.rm = TRUE) >= 2) %>%
  ungroup()

# Criteria #3: Arterial pCO2 >45 and respiratory_rate >= 22 or venous pCO2 >50 and respiratory rate >= 22
#   Arterial Flag
merged_all_locf <- merged_all_locf %>%
  mutate(criteria_three_arterial_flag = if_else(
    pco2_arterial > 45 & respiratory_rate >= 22,
    TRUE, FALSE, missing = FALSE
  ))

# Venous Flag
merged_all_locf <- merged_all_locf %>%
  mutate(criteria_three_venous_flag = if_else(
    pco2_venous > 50 & respiratory_rate >= 22,
    TRUE, FALSE, missing = FALSE
  ))

# Criteria #4: Arterial pCO2 >60 mmHg and pH =< 7.3 or venous pCO2 >65 mmHg and pH =< 7.3
#   Arterial Flag
merged_all_locf <- merged_all_locf %>%
  mutate(criteria_four_arterial_flag = if_else(
    pco2_arterial > 60 & ph_arterial <= 7.3,
    TRUE, FALSE, missing = FALSE
  ))

# Venous Flag
merged_all_locf <- merged_all_locf %>%
  mutate(criteria_four_venous_flag = if_else(
    pco2_venous > 65 & ph_venous <= 7.3,
    TRUE, FALSE, missing = FALSE
  ))

# Criteria #5: Receipt of any non-invasive ventilation
merged_all_locf <- merged_all_locf %>%
  mutate(criteria_five_flag = if_else(
    device_category %in% c("nippv", "cpap"),
    TRUE, FALSE, missing = FALSE
  ))

# FLAG TO IDENTIFY HOSPITALIZATION_IDS with at least 1 criteria flag
merged_all_locf_final <- merged_all_locf %>%
  group_by(hospitalization_id) %>%
  mutate(
    arf_flag = any(
      criteria_one_flag |
      criteria_two_flow_flag |
      criteria_two_fio2_flag |
      criteria_three_arterial_flag |
      criteria_three_venous_flag |
      criteria_four_arterial_flag |
      criteria_four_venous_flag | 
      criteria_five_flag,
      na.rm = TRUE
    )
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    aHrf_flag = any(
      criteria_one_flag |
      criteria_two_flow_flag |
      criteria_two_fio2_flag,
      na.rm = TRUE
    )
  ) %>%
  ungroup()
setDT(merged_all_locf_final)
arf_data <- merged_all_locf_final[, .(hospitalization_id, arf_flag, aHrf_flag)]
arf_data <- unique(arf_data, by = c("hospitalization_id"))
```

#PART SEVEN: Calculate Percent Deep Sedation, Sensitivity Analyses
```{r}
# Vitals
time_dependent_vitals_2 <- c("spo2")
vitals_time_dependent_2 <- vitals_time_dependent[vital_category %in% time_dependent_vitals_2 & hospitalization_id %in% final_cohort_imv_runs_reduced$hospitalization_id]

vitals_time_dependent_wide <- dcast(vitals_time_dependent_2, 
                   hospitalization_id + recorded_dttm ~ vital_category, 
                   value.var = "vital_value", 
                   fun.aggregate = mean,  # Aggregate duplicates using mean
                   fill = NA)  # Fill missing values with NA
setorder(vitals_time_dependent_wide, hospitalization_id, recorded_dttm)

# Labs
labs_time_dependent_wide <- dcast(labs_time_dependent_2, 
                   hospitalization_id + recorded_dttm ~ lab_category, 
                   value.var = "lab_value_numeric", 
                   fun.aggregate = mean,  # Aggregate duplicates using mean
                   fill = NA)  # Fill missing values with NA
setorder(labs_time_dependent_wide, hospitalization_id, recorded_dttm)

#RASS
pat_assess_rass_time_dependent <- pat_assess_rass_filt[hospitalization_id %in% final_cohort_imv_runs$hospitalization_id]
pat_assess_rass_time_dependent <- pat_assess_rass_time_dependent[, .(hospitalization_id, recorded_dttm, rass_value)]
pat_assess_rass_time_dependent[, rass_value := as.numeric(rass_value)]
pat_assess_rass_time_dependent_wide <- pat_assess_rass_time_dependent
setorder(pat_assess_rass_time_dependent_wide, hospitalization_id, recorded_dttm)

# Respiratory
respiratory_support_time_dependent_wide <- respiratory_support |>
  dplyr::filter(hospitalization_id %in% final_cohort_imv_runs_reduced$hospitalization_id) |>
  dplyr::select(hospitalization_id, recorded_dttm, device_category, mode_category, fio2_set, peep_set, lpm_set, tidal_volume_set) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    fio2_set = as.numeric(fio2_set),
    lpm_set = as.numeric(lpm_set),
    fio2_set = if (mean(fio2_set, na.rm = TRUE) > 1) fio2_set / 100 else fio2_set, #Deliberate column check instead of row-wise 
    fio2_set = ifelse(fio2_set >= 0.21 & fio2_set <= 1, fio2_set, NA_real_),
    lpm_set = ifelse(lpm_set >= 0 & lpm_set <= 60, lpm_set, NA_real_)
  )

respiratory_support_time_dependent_wide <- respiratory_support_time_dependent_wide %>%
  # Fill in device_category based on other values
  dplyr::mutate(device_category = case_when(
    mode_category %in% c("SIMV", "Pressure-regulated Volume Control", "Assist Control-Volume Control") ~ "IMV",
    is.na(device_category) & fio2_set == 0.21 & is.na(lpm_set) & is.na(peep_set) & is.na(tidal_volume_set) ~ "Room Air",
    is.na(device_category) & is.na(fio2_set) & lpm_set == 0 & is.na(peep_set) & is.na(tidal_volume_set) ~ "Room Air",
    is.na(device_category) & is.na(fio2_set) & lpm_set >= 20 & is.na(peep_set) & is.na(tidal_volume_set) ~ "High Flow NC",
    device_category == "Nasal Cannula" & is.na(fio2_set) & lpm_set >= 20 ~ "High Flow NC",
    is.na(device_category) & is.na(fio2_set) & lpm_set < 20 & lpm_set > 0 & is.na(peep_set) & is.na(tidal_volume_set) ~ "Nasal Cannula",
    TRUE ~ device_category
  )) %>%
  # Create fio2_combined based on existing values
  dplyr::mutate(fio2_combined = case_when(
    !is.na(fio2_set) ~ fio2_set,
    is.na(fio2_set) & device_category == "Room Air" ~ 0.21,
    is.na(fio2_set) & device_category == "Nasal Cannula" ~ (0.24 + (0.04 * lpm_set)),
    is.na(fio2_set) & device_category == "Face Mask" & lpm_set == 6 ~ 0.35,
    is.na(fio2_set) & device_category == "Face Mask" & lpm_set == 7 ~ 0.41,
    is.na(fio2_set) & device_category == "Face Mask" & lpm_set == 8 ~ 0.47,
    is.na(fio2_set) & device_category == "Face Mask" & lpm_set == 9 ~ 0.53,
    is.na(fio2_set) & device_category == "Face Mask" & lpm_set == 10 ~ 0.60,
    is.na(fio2_set) & device_category == "Face Mask" & lpm_set > 10 ~ 0.90,
    TRUE ~ NA_real_
  )) %>%
  # Keep only the selected columns
  dplyr::select(hospitalization_id, recorded_dttm, device_category, mode_category, lpm_set, fio2_combined)
setDT(respiratory_support_time_dependent_wide)
setorder(respiratory_support_time_dependent_wide, hospitalization_id, recorded_dttm)

# List of tables to merge
tables_merge_wide <- list(vitals_time_dependent_wide,
               pat_assess_rass_time_dependent_wide,
               labs_time_dependent_wide,
               respiratory_support_time_dependent_wide)

# Iterative Merge on Hospitalization_id and recorded_dttm to form time_dependent_timeline
time_dependent_timeline_all <- reduce(tables_merge_wide, function(x, y) merge(x, y, by = c("hospitalization_id", "recorded_dttm"), all = TRUE))

# Baseline Values from 24 Hours Prior to Begin IMV
# Begin IMV
final_cohort_timestamps <- final_cohort_imv_runs_reduced[, .(hospitalization_id, admission_dttm, discharge_dttm, begin_imv, end_imv, imv_duration_hours_final)]

# Calculate start_time (24 hours before begin_imv)
final_cohort_timestamps[, start_time := as.POSIXct(begin_imv) - hours(24)]

# Calculate end_time based on the condition for each hospitalization_id
final_cohort_timestamps[, end_time := as.POSIXct(begin_imv)]

#24 Hours Prior to IMV Timeline
time_dependent_timeline_pre_imv <- merge(final_cohort_timestamps, time_dependent_timeline_all, by = "hospitalization_id", all = TRUE)
setorder(time_dependent_timeline_pre_imv, hospitalization_id, recorded_dttm)

# Filter the table to retain rows where recorded_dttm is within the time range
time_dependent_timeline_pre_imv_24h <- time_dependent_timeline_pre_imv[recorded_dttm >= start_time & recorded_dttm <= end_time]
time_dependent_timeline_pre_imv_24h <- time_dependent_timeline_pre_imv_24h[, .(hospitalization_id, recorded_dttm, begin_imv, spo2, rass_value, po2_arterial, fio2_combined)]

#LOCF
cols_to_update_imv_24h <- c("spo2", "rass_value", "po2_arterial", "fio2_combined")
time_dependent_timeline_pre_imv_24h[, (cols_to_update_imv_24h) := lapply(.SD, function(x) fifelse(x == "", NA, x)), .SDcols = cols_to_update_imv_24h]

time_dependent_timeline_pre_locf <- time_dependent_timeline_pre_imv_24h[, (cols_to_update_imv_24h) := lapply(.SD, function(x) na.locf(x, na.rm = FALSE)), 
                 by = hospitalization_id, .SDcols = cols_to_update_imv_24h]

# Define columns for min and max selection
cols_min_1 <- c("rass_value", "spo2", "po2_arterial", "begin_imv")
cols_max_1 <- c("recorded_dttm", "fio2_combined")

# Compute the min and max for each hospitalization_id and hour_imv
time_dependent_timeline_pre_final <- time_dependent_timeline_pre_locf[, 
    lapply(.SD, min), by = .(hospitalization_id), .SDcols = cols_min_1][
    time_dependent_timeline_pre_locf[, lapply(.SD, max), by = .(hospitalization_id), .SDcols = cols_max_1], 
    on = .(hospitalization_id)
]
 
time_dependent_timeline_last_primary <- time_dependent_timeline_pre_final

time_dependent_timeline_last_primary[, recorded_dttm := begin_imv - minutes(15)]
time_dependent_timeline_last_primary[, hour_imv := 0]
time_dependent_timeline_last_primary[, c("begin_imv") := NULL]

# Primary analysis: impute RASS = -5 at hour 0 (deep sedation assumed at intubation onset)
# LOCF carries this forward until first documented RASS
# First 4 hours excluded from % deep sedation calculation to minimize imputation impact
# Sensitivity analysis uses RASS = -1 (light sedation) to bound imputation effect
time_dependent_timeline_last_sensitivity <- time_dependent_timeline_last_primary
time_dependent_timeline_last_primary$rass_value <- -5
time_dependent_timeline_last_sensitivity$rass_value <- -1

# Form Hourly Table
timeline_meta <- final_cohort_timestamps[, .(
  start = min(begin_imv, na.rm=TRUE),
  dur = max(0, pmin(72, min(imv_duration_hours_final, na.rm=TRUE)))
), by = hospitalization_id]

imv_timeline_72h <- timeline_meta[, .(
  recorded_dttm = seq(
    from = start, 
    to = start + dhours(dur), # dhours() gives a lubridate duration
    by = "1 hour"
  )
), by = .(hospitalization_id)]

# Calculate start_time
imv_timeline_72h[, start_time := min(recorded_dttm, na.rm = TRUE), by = hospitalization_id]

# Calculate end_time as the last recorded_dttm for each hospitalization_id
imv_timeline_72h[, end_time := max(recorded_dttm, na.rm = TRUE), by = hospitalization_id]

imv_timeline_72h[, hour_imv := seq_len(.N) - 1, by = hospitalization_id]

start_end_time <- imv_timeline_72h[, .SD[1], by = hospitalization_id]
start_end_time <- start_end_time[, .(hospitalization_id, start_time, end_time)]

imv_timeline_72h[, c("start_time", "end_time") := NULL]

# Merge to timeline
total_timeline <- merge(imv_timeline_72h, time_dependent_timeline_all, by = c("hospitalization_id", "recorded_dttm"), all = TRUE)

setcolorder(total_timeline, c("hospitalization_id", "hour_imv", "recorded_dttm", "rass_value", "spo2",  "po2_arterial", "fio2_combined"))

total_timeline_filt <- merge(total_timeline, start_end_time, by = "hospitalization_id", all = TRUE)

#LOCF
cols_to_update_imv_total <- c("hour_imv", "rass_value", "spo2", "po2_arterial", "fio2_combined")

total_timeline_primary <- merge(total_timeline_filt, time_dependent_timeline_last_primary, by = c("hospitalization_id", "recorded_dttm", "hour_imv", "rass_value", "spo2", "po2_arterial", "fio2_combined"), all = TRUE)

total_timeline_primary[, pao2_imputed := {
  s <- spo2 / 100
  a <- 11700 / ((1 / s) - 1)
  b <- sqrt(50^3 + a^2)
  (b + a)^(1/3) + (b - a)^(1/3)
}]

total_timeline_primary[, (cols_to_update_imv_total) := lapply(.SD, function(x) fifelse(x == "", NA, x)), .SDcols = cols_to_update_imv_total]

# Determine worst P/F ratio in first 12 hours of IMV
# With plausibility filtering, missingness auditing, and multiple imputation
###############################################################################

setDT(total_timeline_primary)
setorder(total_timeline_primary, hospitalization_id, recorded_dttm)

# 1 LOCF pao2_imputed, fio2_combined within hospitalization before computing ratios
total_timeline_primary[
  ,
  pao2_imputed_locf := na.locf(pao2_imputed, na.rm = FALSE),
  by = hospitalization_id
]

total_timeline_primary[
  ,
  fio2_combined_locf := na.locf(fio2_combined, na.rm = FALSE),
  by = hospitalization_id
]

# 2 Calculate P/F ratios with plausibility filter
PF_MIN <- 50
PF_MAX <- 700

total_timeline_primary[, p_to_f := fcase(
  is.na(po2_arterial) | is.na(fio2_combined),                     NA_real_,
  (po2_arterial / fio2_combined) < PF_MIN,                        NA_real_,
  (po2_arterial / fio2_combined) > PF_MAX,                        NA_real_,
  default = po2_arterial / fio2_combined
)]

total_timeline_primary[, p_to_f_imputed := fcase(
  is.na(pao2_imputed_locf) | is.na(fio2_combined_locf),           NA_real_,
  (pao2_imputed_locf / fio2_combined_locf) < PF_MIN,              NA_real_,
  (pao2_imputed_locf / fio2_combined_locf) > PF_MAX,              NA_real_,
  default = pao2_imputed_locf / fio2_combined_locf
)]

# Flag implausible raw values before filtering (for audit)
total_timeline_primary[, pf_implausible := fcase(
  !is.na(po2_arterial) & !is.na(fio2_combined) &
    (po2_arterial / fio2_combined) < PF_MIN,                      "implausible_low",
  !is.na(po2_arterial) & !is.na(fio2_combined) &
    (po2_arterial / fio2_combined) > PF_MAX,                      "implausible_high",
  default = NA_character_
)]

# 3 Filter to first 12 hours of IMV
pf_candidates_12h <- total_timeline_primary[
  !is.na(hour_imv) & hour_imv >= 0 & hour_imv <= 12
]

# 4 Audit missingness per patient across the 12h window
pf_audit <- pf_candidates_12h[, .(
  has_po2          = any(!is.na(po2_arterial)),
  has_spo2         = any(!is.na(spo2)),
  has_fio2         = any(!is.na(fio2_combined)),
  has_fio2_locf    = any(!is.na(fio2_combined_locf)),
  has_pao2_imp     = any(!is.na(pao2_imputed_locf)),
  n_implausible    = sum(!is.na(pf_implausible)),
  implausible_reason = fcase(
    any(pf_implausible == "implausible_low",  na.rm = TRUE),      "implausible_low",
    any(pf_implausible == "implausible_high", na.rm = TRUE),      "implausible_high",
    default = NA_character_
  ),
  n_po2_obs        = sum(!is.na(po2_arterial)),
  n_spo2_obs       = sum(!is.na(spo2)),
  n_fio2_obs       = sum(!is.na(fio2_combined))
), by = hospitalization_id]

# Classify missingness reason
pf_audit[, missing_pf_reason := fcase(
  has_po2  & has_fio2,                          "has_measured_pf",
  has_pao2_imp & has_fio2_locf,                 "has_imputed_pf_only",
  !has_fio2 & !has_fio2_locf & 
    (has_po2 | has_spo2),                       "missing_fio2_only",
  (has_fio2 | has_fio2_locf) & 
    !has_po2 & !has_spo2,                       "missing_o2_only",
  !has_fio2 & !has_fio2_locf & 
    !has_po2 & !has_spo2,                       "missing_fio2_and_o2",
  default = "other"
)]

# Print audit summary
cat("\n=== P/F Missingness Audit (first 12h IMV) ===\n")
print(pf_audit[, .N, by = missing_pf_reason][order(-N)])

cat("\n=== Implausible P/F values ===\n")
print(pf_audit[n_implausible > 0, .N, by = implausible_reason])

cat("\n=== Patients with po2 + fio2 but unexpected missingness ===\n")
print(nrow(pf_audit[missing_pf_reason == "has_measured_pf"]))

# 5 Select worst (minimum) plausible P/F per patient
#   Sort ascending so [1] = worst; NAs pushed to end
pf_worst_12h <- pf_candidates_12h[
  order(hospitalization_id, p_to_f, na.last = TRUE)
][
  ,
  {
    measured_idx <- which(!is.na(p_to_f))[1]
    imputed_idx  <- which(!is.na(p_to_f_imputed))[1]

    if (!is.na(measured_idx)) {
      .(
        pf_selected      = p_to_f[measured_idx],
        pf_source        = "measured_p_to_f",
        pf_recorded_dttm = recorded_dttm[measured_idx],
        p_to_f           = p_to_f[measured_idx],
        p_to_f_imputed   = p_to_f_imputed[measured_idx]
      )
    } else if (!is.na(imputed_idx)) {
      .(
        pf_selected      = p_to_f_imputed[imputed_idx],
        pf_source        = "imputed_p_to_f",
        pf_recorded_dttm = recorded_dttm[imputed_idx],
        p_to_f           = NA_real_,
        p_to_f_imputed   = p_to_f_imputed[imputed_idx]
      )
    } else {
      .(
        pf_selected      = NA_real_,
        pf_source        = "no_valid_pf",
        pf_recorded_dttm = as.POSIXct(NA),
        p_to_f           = NA_real_,
        p_to_f_imputed   = NA_real_
      )
    }
  },
  by = hospitalization_id
]

# 6 Merge pf + audit into cohort table
summary_meds_data_final <- merge(
  summary_meds_data_final,
  pf_worst_12h,
  by = "hospitalization_id",
  all.x = TRUE
)

summary_meds_data_final <- merge(
  summary_meds_data_final,
  pf_audit[, .(hospitalization_id, missing_pf_reason, n_implausible, implausible_reason)],
  by = "hospitalization_id",
  all.x = TRUE
)
################################################################################
###############################################################################

# NOTE: total_timeline_primary is modified in place by the LOCF step below.
# total_timeline_filt (used as base for sensitivity) must be merged BEFORE
# this line to avoid inheriting the LOCF'd values.
total_timeline_locf_primary <- total_timeline_primary[, (cols_to_update_imv_total) := lapply(.SD, function(x) na.locf(x, na.rm = FALSE)), 
                 by = hospitalization_id, .SDcols = cols_to_update_imv_total]

# Filter the table to retain rows where recorded_dttm is within the time range
total_timeline_locf_primary_filt <- total_timeline_locf_primary[recorded_dttm >= start_time & recorded_dttm <= end_time]

# Define columns for min and max selection
cols_min <- c("rass_value", "spo2", "po2_arterial", "pao2_imputed")
cols_max <- c("fio2_combined")

# Compute the min and max for each hospitalization_id and hour_imv
total_timeline_hourly_primary <- total_timeline_locf_primary_filt[, 
    lapply(.SD, min), by = .(hospitalization_id, hour_imv), .SDcols = cols_min][
    total_timeline_locf_primary_filt[, lapply(.SD, max), by = .(hospitalization_id, hour_imv), .SDcols = cols_max], 
    on = .(hospitalization_id, hour_imv)
]

###############################################################################
#### SENSITIVITY SECTION ###
total_timeline_hourly_primary <- as.data.frame(total_timeline_hourly_primary)

#Sensitivity Analysis Numbers
cols_to_update_imv_sensitivity <- c("hour_imv", "rass_value")

total_timeline_sensitivity <- merge(total_timeline_filt, time_dependent_timeline_last_sensitivity, by = c("hospitalization_id", "recorded_dttm", "hour_imv", "rass_value", "spo2", "po2_arterial", "fio2_combined"), all = TRUE)

total_timeline_sensitivity[, pao2_imputed := {
  s <- spo2 / 100
  a <- 11700 / ((1 / s) - 1)
  b <- sqrt(50^3 + a^2)
  (b + a)^(1/3) + (b - a)^(1/3)
}]

total_timeline_sensitivity[, (cols_to_update_imv_sensitivity) := lapply(.SD, function(x) fifelse(x == "", NA, x)), .SDcols = cols_to_update_imv_sensitivity]

total_timeline_locf_sensitivity <- total_timeline_sensitivity[, (cols_to_update_imv_sensitivity) := lapply(.SD, function(x) na.locf(x, na.rm = FALSE)), 
                 by = hospitalization_id, .SDcols = cols_to_update_imv_sensitivity]

# Filter the table to retain rows where recorded_dttm is within the time range
total_timeline_locf_sensitivity_filt <- total_timeline_locf_sensitivity[recorded_dttm >= start_time & recorded_dttm <= end_time]

# Compute the min and max for each hospitalization_id and hour_imv
total_timeline_hourly_sensitivity <- total_timeline_locf_sensitivity_filt[, 
    lapply(.SD, min), by = .(hospitalization_id, hour_imv), .SDcols = cols_min][
```
