```{r}
    total_timeline_locf_sensitivity_filt[, lapply(.SD, max), by = .(hospitalization_id, hour_imv), .SDcols = cols_max], 
    on = .(hospitalization_id, hour_imv)
]

setDT(total_timeline_hourly_sensitivity)

total_timeline_hourly_sensitivity <- total_timeline_hourly_sensitivity[, .(hospitalization_id, hour_imv, rass_value)]

################################################################################

setDT(total_timeline_hourly_primary)

# Deep Sedation Flag 
total_timeline_hourly_rass_filter <- total_timeline_hourly_primary[, 
  deep_sedation_hourly := fifelse(is.na(rass_value), NA, fifelse(rass_value <= -3, TRUE, FALSE))
]

# Merge with Time Independent Table
independent_dependent_merge <- merge(total_timeline_hourly_rass_filter, final_cohort_imv_runs_reduced, by = "hospitalization_id", all = TRUE)

#Calculate Percent Deep Sedation for total 72 hours
timeline_72h_no_first_four <- independent_dependent_merge %>%
  filter(hour_imv >= 4)

deep_sedation_count_total_72 <- timeline_72h_no_first_four[
  deep_sedation_hourly == TRUE, 
  .N, 
  by = hospitalization_id
]
setnames(deep_sedation_count_total_72, "N", "deep_sedation_count_total_72")

row_count_minus_one_72 <- timeline_72h_no_first_four[
  , .(hours_mechanically_ventilated_72 = .N), 
  by = hospitalization_id
]

sedation_and_imv_72 <- merge(row_count_minus_one_72, deep_sedation_count_total_72, by = "hospitalization_id", all = TRUE)

# Replace NA values in deep_sedation_count_total_72 with 0
setnafill(sedation_and_imv_72, cols = "deep_sedation_count_total_72", fill = 0)

sedation_and_imv_72[, percent_deep_sedation_72 := (deep_sedation_count_total_72 / hours_mechanically_ventilated_72) * 100]


#Calculate Percent Deep Sedation for First 48 Hours
independent_dependent_merge_48 <- independent_dependent_merge[hour_imv <= 48]

timeline_48h_no_first_four <- independent_dependent_merge_48 %>%
  filter(hour_imv >= 4)

deep_sedation_count_total_48 <- timeline_48h_no_first_four[
  deep_sedation_hourly == TRUE, 
  .N, 
  by = hospitalization_id
]
setnames(deep_sedation_count_total_48, "N", "deep_sedation_count_total_48")

row_count_48 <- timeline_48h_no_first_four[
  , .(hours_mechanically_ventilated_48 = .N), 
  by = hospitalization_id
]

sedation_and_imv_48 <- merge(row_count_48, deep_sedation_count_total_48, by = "hospitalization_id", all = TRUE)

# Replace NA values in deep_sedation_count_total_48 with 0
setnafill(sedation_and_imv_48, cols = "deep_sedation_count_total_48", fill = 0)

sedation_and_imv_48[, percent_deep_sedation_48 := (deep_sedation_count_total_48 / hours_mechanically_ventilated_48) * 100]

###############################################################################
#Negative 1 Imputation Sensitivity Analysis
# Deep Sedation Flag
total_timeline_hourly_rass_sensitivity <- total_timeline_hourly_sensitivity[, 
  deep_sedation_hourly := fifelse(is.na(rass_value), NA, fifelse(rass_value <= -3, TRUE, FALSE))
]

#Calculate Percent Deep Sedation
total_timeline_hourly_rass_sensitivity_48 <- total_timeline_hourly_rass_sensitivity[hour_imv <= 48]

timeline_48h_no_first_four_sensitivity <- total_timeline_hourly_rass_sensitivity_48 %>%
  filter(hour_imv >= 4)

deep_sedation_count_total_48_sensitivity <- timeline_48h_no_first_four_sensitivity[
  deep_sedation_hourly == TRUE, 
  .N, 
  by = hospitalization_id
]
setnames(deep_sedation_count_total_48_sensitivity, "N", "deep_sedation_count_total_48_sensitivity")

row_count_minus_one_48_sensitivity <- timeline_48h_no_first_four_sensitivity[
  , .(hours_mechanically_ventilated_48_sensitivity = .N), 
  by = hospitalization_id
]

sedation_and_imv_48_sensitivity <- merge(row_count_minus_one_48_sensitivity, deep_sedation_count_total_48_sensitivity, by = "hospitalization_id", all = TRUE)

# Replace NA values in deep_sedation_count_total_48 with 0
setnafill(sedation_and_imv_48_sensitivity, cols = "deep_sedation_count_total_48_sensitivity", fill = 0)

sedation_and_imv_48_sensitivity[, percent_deep_sedation_48_sensitivity := (deep_sedation_count_total_48_sensitivity / hours_mechanically_ventilated_48_sensitivity) * 100]

sedation_and_imv_48_sensitivity[, .(hospitalization_id, percent_deep_sedation_48_sensitivity)]

##########

#Time to first rass
time_to_first_rass_analysis <- time_to_first_rass_final[hospitalization_id %in% final_cohort_imv_runs_reduced$hospitalization_id]

# Complete Time_independent_table for primary analysis
# List of tables to merge
primary_analysis_tables <- list(final_cohort_imv_runs_reduced,
               sedation_and_imv_72,
               sedation_and_imv_48,
               sedation_and_imv_48_sensitivity,
               time_to_first_rass_analysis,
               summary_meds_data_final,
               arf_data)

# Iterative Merge on Hospitalization_id to form primary analysis analytic
primary_analysis_raw <- reduce(primary_analysis_tables, function(x, y) merge(x, y, by = "hospitalization_id", all = TRUE))
# Replace NA values in rass_below_minus_3_count with 0
setnafill(primary_analysis_raw, cols = "rass_below_minus_3_count", fill = 0)

primary_analysis_analytic <- primary_analysis_raw[, .(hospitalization_id, begin_imv, end_imv, imv_duration_hours_final, admission_dttm, discharge_dttm, death_dttm, hospital_id, icu_imv, hospital_icu_id, location_of_intubation, first_location_category, age_at_admission, age_category, admission_type_category, discharge_category, sex_category, race_category, ethnicity_category, ethnicity_category_final, SVM_SCORE, language_category, elixhauser_score, weight_kg, admission_height, bmi, trached, reintubation_final, mortality_28day, death_during_admission, hospital_free_days_6mo, hospital_free_days_28, icu_free_days_28, vent_free_days_28, vent_free_days_28_alt, vent_free_days_28_hours, laps2, deep_sedation_weighted, sedation_index_score, rass_weighted_avg, median_rass_binary, median_rass_cont, rass_frequency_hrs, time_from_begin_imv_to_icu_hours, time_to_first_rass, hours_mechanically_ventilated_72, percent_deep_sedation_48, percent_deep_sedation_72, percent_deep_sedation_48_sensitivity, deep_sedation_count_total_48, propofol_avg_mcgkgmin_48, dexmedetomidine_avg_mcgkghr_48, cont_opioids_receipt, cont_benzos_receipt, cont_prop_receipt, cont_precedex_receipt, cont_ketamine_receipt, cont_pentobarbital_receipt, total_mme, lorazepam_equiv_total_48, continuous_nmba_48, continuous_nmba_start_48, continuous_nmba_hours_48, pf_selected, pf_source, pf_recorded_dttm, push_paralytics, cont_analgesia_only, arf_flag, aHrf_flag)]

# Add Observation Year
primary_analysis_analytic[, observation_year := year(admission_dttm)]
primary_analysis_analytic[, observation_year := as.double(observation_year)]

# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# QUALITY CHECK: Missingness in key variables (primary_analysis_analytic)
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
vars_to_check <- c(
  #Key covariates/Table 1 variables
  "sex_category", "ethnicity_category", "language_category",
  "race_category", "hospital_id", "icu_imv", "location_of_intubation",
  "admission_type_category", "arf_flag", "aHrf_flag", "hospital_icu_id",
  "age_at_admission", "bmi", "elixhauser_score", "SVM_SCORE", "laps2",
  "time_to_first_rass", "rass_frequency_hrs", "observation_year", 
  "time_from_begin_imv_to_icu_hours",
  # Outcomes
  "imv_duration_hours_final", "trached", "vent_free_days_28", "vent_free_days_28_alt", 
  "vent_free_days_28_hours", "deep_sedation_weighted", "sedation_index_score", 
  "percent_deep_sedation_48", "percent_deep_sedation_72", "percent_deep_sedation_48_sensitivity",
  "deep_sedation_count_total_48", "cont_opioids_receipt", "cont_benzos_receipt", 
  "total_mme", "lorazepam_equiv_total_48", "continuous_nmba_48", "push_paralytics",
  "cont_analgesia_only", "median_rass_binary", "median_rass_cont", "rass_weighted_avg"
)

missing_from_data <- setdiff(vars_to_check, names(primary_analysis_analytic))
if (length(missing_from_data) > 0) {
  warning(
    "The following key variables are ABSENT from primary_analysis_analytic entirely:\n  ",
    paste(missing_from_data, collapse = ", "), "\n",
    "Missing or NA values seen in key variables - please contact Alex Ortiz on Slack for troubleshooting and evaluation."
  )
}

vars_present <- intersect(vars_to_check, names(primary_analysis_analytic))

missingness_summary <- data.table(
  variable    = vars_present,
  n_missing   = sapply(vars_present, function(v) {
    col <- primary_analysis_analytic[[v]]
    sum(is.na(col) | (is.character(col) & trimws(col) == ""))
  }),
  pct_missing = sapply(vars_present, function(v) {
    col <- primary_analysis_analytic[[v]]
    n_miss <- sum(is.na(col) | (is.character(col) & trimws(col) == ""))
    round(100 * n_miss / nrow(primary_analysis_analytic), 2)
  })
)

message("── Key Variable Missingness Report ──────────────────────────────")
print(missingness_summary[order(-n_missing)])
message("─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────")

vars_with_missing <- missingness_summary[n_missing > 0, variable]
if (length(vars_with_missing) > 0) {
  warning(
    "Missing or NA values seen in the following key variables:\n  ",
    paste(
      sapply(vars_with_missing, function(v) {
        row <- missingness_summary[variable == v]
        sprintf("%s (n=%d, %.1f%%)", v, row$n_missing, row$pct_missing)
      }),
      collapse = "\n  "
    ), "\n\n",
    "Please contact Alex Ortiz on Slack for troubleshooting and evaluation."
  )
}

if (length(vars_with_missing) == 0 && length(missing_from_data) == 0) {
  message("✓ Your table is clean - proceed to 01_analysis!")
}

# Clean up temporary QC objects from the environment.
# suppressWarnings() prevents "object not found" errors if a collaborator's
# run errored mid-block and some of these were never created.
suppressWarnings(rm(vars_to_check, missing_from_data, vars_present, 
                    missingness_summary, vars_with_missing))
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

write_parquet(primary_analysis_analytic, paste0(intermediate_dir, "analytic_file", institution, ".parquet"))
```
